visa_types.name: Apply for visa
visa_types.documents_required:
Russian Law on Data Protection
- According to the Federal law of the Russian Federation №152-ФЗ “On personal data” all applicants should sign “The agreement on processing personal data”. Please note that an applicant who submits his/her documents through an authorized representative should also prepare this document in advance and submit it along with his/her Application.

“On personal data” (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/QnHKoUNEyyUAJ6BJOeTT8/cf4ada6b8764b8f81915f9daf9109b02/Processing-of-personal-data-L.pdf)
Please note: Visa application center cannot accept your application in case you don’t fill the data protection form. Be informed that filled form must be presented any time you submit documents in visa center.
      Before submission, kindly go through below requirement to ensure that you have fully completed the necessary document:
- 	1 Completed visa application form 14 A (Applicant below 14 years old, form to be signed by one of the parents)
- 	1 recent passport-size photograph (3.5 x 4.5 cm)
- * Image must be taken within the last 3 months. New photo must be submitted when applying for a new application
- * Photograph should be in colour, must be taken against a white background with a matt or semi – matt finish
- * Image must show the full face and without headgear ( headgear worn on accordance with religious or racial customs or acceptable but must not hide the facial features)
- Photocopy of confirmed air ticket onward/return from Singapore to the next destination
- Copy of Marriage Certificate (if applicable)
- Accommodation bookings (For applicants staying at a hotel,serviced apartment or hostel)
- Copy of NRIC of Singapore Citizen (SC) /Singapore Permanent Resident (SPR) sponsor in Singapore (For applicants staying with Singapore citizens or Singapore permanent residents (please attach to Form V39A (letter of introduction)
- Copy of tenancy agreements/title deeds and copy of Employment Pass, S Pass or Work Permit of Non SC/SPR sponsor in Singapore (For applicants staying with Employment Pass/S Pass or Work Permit Holders)
- Original and Photocopy of passport;
- Entry facilities (such as visa) to next destination (if required)
- Copy of Form
V39A (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/mWecYQuGAM8I4gAVik10Q/b083f435f93aaeef085ab258ff263646/formv39-28.06.21-new.pdf)
(letter of introduction)
- signed by Singapore citizen or Singapore PR (for applicants who are staying with local contacts who are Singapore citizens or Singapore Permanent Resident
- Copy of Form
V39A (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/mWecYQuGAM8I4gAVik10Q/b083f435f93aaeef085ab258ff263646/formv39-28.06.21-new.pdf)
(letter of introduction) signed by Singapore business partner (for business visa applicants)
- Proof of Residency/Legal Presence in Russia.  All applicants are required to demonstrate their legal status in Russia at the point of application. Russian citizens should produce their internal passports.  Other nationals should produce proof of legal presence in Russia (i.e. valid visa/work permit/residency card).
- Written Authorisation Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7l5xfWd9U88gNzpH7ArLPZ/73e85614ee85705defa2e46f0ad5d286/letter-of-authorisation-feb-2022.pdf)
(for applications submitted through a representative).  Applicants who submit their applications through a representative are required to sign a written authorisation form.  The representative must submit the duly completed form as part of the visa application.  The applicant should provide a reason why he/she is unable to submit the application in person.
- Letter of employment indicating position and monthly salary
- Letter from educational institute
- Copy of certificate of incorporation of the company (for individual  entrepreneurs and LLC owners)
- Letter of invitation from Singapore company (for business travelers)
- Latest bank statement (dated within last 60 days) with actual bank stamp (not online version). Applicants who are individual entrepreneurs and LLC owners may provide their company’s bank statement in lieu of personal statement. Applicants who are being sponsored should submit proof of sponsorship and sponsor’s bank statement.
- To apply for the visa with several entries, documents for each planned entry in your trip should be provided.
Important Note:
The validity of the entry visa issued is subject to the authority and discretion of the Immigration and Checkpoints Authority of Singapore (ICA). Possession of a visa does not entitle a foreigner to enter Singapore automatically. The grant of a visit pass to foreign visitor is determined by the Immigration and Checkpoints Authority (ICA) at the Singapore checkpoints and each case is considered on its own merits.
visa_types.visa_fees:
Visa and service fees are stated in the table below (please note that all fees are accepted in Rubles only).

[Table:Apply for visa]
Please note:
- Visa fee is stated in SGD. Payments in visa applications centers are carried out in Rubles in accordance with the exchange rate of the Embassy of Singapore in Russia. Visa and service fees can be paid in cash or credit card. All fees are non-refundable.
- Please request for a receipt indicating the breakdown of visa processing fee and service charge upon making payment.
visa_types.processing_time:
The processing of visa application will  take at least 7 working days excluding the day of submission. However, some  applications may take a longer time to process
Applicants need to plan their travel in advance as there is no facility for expediting the visa application process.
visa_types.forms:
Visa Application Form 14A 
Form V39A (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1vvwr2KlwbRVXwzPE8kVmv/4b3faa208d633d48fa49563d51aeec03/formv39a.pdf)
Visa Application Form 14 A Sample
visa_types.overview:
Overview
For latest information, please visit: https://www.ica.gov.sg/enter-transit-depart (https://www.ica.gov.sg/enter-transit-depart)
Important Notes 
Kindly note, that application can be submitted not earlier than 30 days before intended date of arrival in Singapore.
Each application for a visa will be considered on its own merits. 
Possession of a valid visa alone does not guarantee entry into Singapore. Visitors must also meet entry requirements such as holding a valid passport with at least 6 months validity, sufficient funds for the period of stay in Singapore and confirmed onward/return air ticket. 

                                                          ICA may share your personal information with other Government agencies to process any applications you have made or to render you a service, so as to serve you in a most efficient and effective way, unless such sharing is prohibited by legislation
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
For latest information, please visit: https://www.ica.gov.sg/enter-transit-depart (https://www.ica.gov.sg/enter-transit-depart)
Important Notes 
Kindly note, that application can be submitted not earlier than 30 days before intended date of arrival in Singapore.
Each application for a visa will be considered on its own merits. 
Possession of a valid visa alone does not guarantee entry into Singapore. Visitors must also meet entry requirements such as holding a valid passport with at least 6 months validity, sufficient funds for the period of stay in Singapore and confirmed onward/return air ticket. 

                                                          ICA may share your personal information with other Government agencies to process any applications you have made or to render you a service, so as to serve you in a most efficient and effective way, unless such sharing is prohibited by legislation

## Visa Fees
Visa and service fees are stated in the table below (please note that all fees are accepted in Rubles only).

[Table:Apply for visa]
Please note:
- Visa fee is stated in SGD. Payments in visa applications centers are carried out in Rubles in accordance with the exchange rate of the Embassy of Singapore in Russia. Visa and service fees can be paid in cash or credit card. All fees are non-refundable.
- Please request for a receipt indicating the breakdown of visa processing fee and service charge upon making payment.

## Documents Required
Russian Law on Data Protection
- According to the Federal law of the Russian Federation №152-ФЗ “On personal data” all applicants should sign “The agreement on processing personal data”. Please note that an applicant who submits his/her documents through an authorized representative should also prepare this document in advance and submit it along with his/her Application.

“On personal data” (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/QnHKoUNEyyUAJ6BJOeTT8/cf4ada6b8764b8f81915f9daf9109b02/Processing-of-personal-data-L.pdf)
Please note: Visa application center cannot accept your application in case you don’t fill the data protection form. Be informed that filled form must be presented any time you submit documents in visa center.
      Before submission, kindly go through below requirement to ensure that you have fully completed the necessary document:
- 	1 Completed visa application form 14 A (Applicant below 14 years old, form to be signed by one of the parents)
- 	1 recent passport-size photograph (3.5 x 4.5 cm)
- * Image must be taken within the last 3 months. New photo must be submitted when applying for a new application
- * Photograph should be in colour, must be taken against a white background with a matt or semi – matt finish
- * Image must show the full face and without headgear ( headgear worn on accordance with religious or racial customs or acceptable but must not hide the facial features)
- Photocopy of confirmed air ticket onward/return from Singapore to the next destination
- Copy of Marriage Certificate (if applicable)
- Accommodation bookings (For applicants staying at a hotel,serviced apartment or hostel)
- Copy of NRIC of Singapore Citizen (SC) /Singapore Permanent Resident (SPR) sponsor in Singapore (For applicants staying with Singapore citizens or Singapore permanent residents (please attach to Form V39A (letter of introduction)
- Copy of tenancy agreements/title deeds and copy of Employment Pass, S Pass or Work Permit of Non SC/SPR sponsor in Singapore (For applicants staying with Employment Pass/S Pass or Work Permit Holders)
- Original and Photocopy of passport;
- Entry facilities (such as visa) to next destination (if required)
- Copy of Form
V39A (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/mWecYQuGAM8I4gAVik10Q/b083f435f93aaeef085ab258ff263646/formv39-28.06.21-new.pdf)
(letter of introduction)
- signed by Singapore citizen or Singapore PR (for applicants who are staying with local contacts who are Singapore citizens or Singapore Permanent Resident
- Copy of Form
V39A (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/mWecYQuGAM8I4gAVik10Q/b083f435f93aaeef085ab258ff263646/formv39-28.06.21-new.pdf)
(letter of introduction) signed by Singapore business partner (for business visa applicants)
- Proof of Residency/Legal Presence in Russia.  All applicants are required to demonstrate their legal status in Russia at the point of application. Russian citizens should produce their internal passports.  Other nationals should produce proof of legal presence in Russia (i.e. valid visa/work permit/residency card).
- Written Authorisation Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7l5xfWd9U88gNzpH7ArLPZ/73e85614ee85705defa2e46f0ad5d286/letter-of-authorisation-feb-2022.pdf)
(for applications submitted through a representative).  Applicants who submit their applications through a representative are required to sign a written authorisation form.  The representative must submit the duly completed form as part of the visa application.  The applicant should provide a reason why he/she is unable to submit the application in person.
- Letter of employment indicating position and monthly salary
- Letter from educational institute
- Copy of certificate of incorporation of the company (for individual  entrepreneurs and LLC owners)
- Letter of invitation from Singapore company (for business travelers)
- Latest bank statement (dated within last 60 days) with actual bank stamp (not online version). Applicants who are individual entrepreneurs and LLC owners may provide their company’s bank statement in lieu of personal statement. Applicants who are being sponsored should submit proof of sponsorship and sponsor’s bank statement.
- To apply for the visa with several entries, documents for each planned entry in your trip should be provided.
Important Note:
The validity of the entry visa issued is subject to the authority and discretion of the Immigration and Checkpoints Authority of Singapore (ICA). Possession of a visa does not entitle a foreigner to enter Singapore automatically. The grant of a visit pass to foreign visitor is determined by the Immigration and Checkpoints Authority (ICA) at the Singapore checkpoints and each case is considered on its own merits.

## Photo Specifications
General information  
- Photo should be colored,       full-faced and without fringing.
- Photo should have been taken within the last three months and not used for previous submission of application.
- Each applicant should       submit 1 photo along with visa application.
Photo size
- 35  x 45 mm with       face centered in the frame
- Head (from the top of the       head to the bottom of the chin) should be about 30 mm.
Photo specifications 
- Photo should be taken fullface       with applicant facing camera directly.
- Face should cover about       70-80% of the photo.
- Photo should be colored       and have white background. Photos with dark or patterned background will       not be accepted.
- Face should be clearly       seen. It is preferable to have ears open.
- Sunglasses or other       accessories are not acceptable unless required for medical reasons (e.g.       eye patch).
- Photo depicting a person       wearing a traditional facemask or a veil that does not permit adequate       identification is not acceptable.
Please note: 
 Kindly follow  the instructions above. If photos provided do not correspond with the Consulate  requirements your application pack will be considered incomplete. In case you  do not have an opportunity to make a photo in advance you can do it in visa  application center. 

## Processing Time
The processing of visa application will  take at least 7 working days excluding the day of submission. However, some  applications may take a longer time to process
Applicants need to plan their travel in advance as there is no facility for expediting the visa application process.

## Download Forms

Visa Application Form 14A 
Form V39A (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1vvwr2KlwbRVXwzPE8kVmv/4b3faa208d633d48fa49563d51aeec03/formv39a.pdf)
Visa Application Form 14 A Sample

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.
